name: Corn Bread Dressing by Gladys Daniels
recipeInstructions:
1. Make hot broth from turkey giblets, celery, onions, salt, and pepper.
2. Add poultry seasoning to the hot broth.
3. Mix until smooth.
4. Place in a pre-heated oven set to 250 degrees until browned.
Note: The secret ingredient not listed was her love for her children.
